title: Forlais Compression Notation Public Papers: BF16 Trained-Weight Compression Evidence Pack
description: A curated public release of selected Forlais Compression Notation papers on BF16 trained-weight lossless compression, the 1.52x entropy ceiling, Benford-derived mantissa structure, mutual-information limits, component decomposition, public compressor behaviour, and public-safe transforms. The release excludes non-public source logs, operational code, model weights, hidden benchmark mechanics, and operational procedures.
notes: This release is a public paper pack. Non-public source logs, operational code, non-public datasets, model weights, hidden benchmark mechanics, and operational procedures are not included.
